query: amateur snapshot with crooked tilted horizon, accidentally rotated photo, off-kilter handheld shot
message: composition_and_structure / unconventional_framing — anti_aesthetic. Off-kilter, dutch-angle, accidentally rotated handheld snapshots with informal vernacular framing. Includes parties, sports wipeouts, fallen signs, casual portraiture, awkward angles.

response.objective_caption: A girl with long brown hair rides a red and yellow mountain bike with black tires on a paved road. She wears a white short-sleeve t-shirt with a small graphic on the left sleeve, light-colored pants, and a beaded necklace. Her hands grip the handlebars and her feet are on the pedals. Dark green foliage and a strip of grass line the background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A girl with long brown hair rides a red and yellow mountain bike with black tires on a paved road, captured with intentional motion blur that streaks the background foliage and blurs the spinning wheels into soft horizontal lines while her upper body and face remain relatively sharp. She wears a white short-sleeve t-shirt with a small graphic on the left sleeve, light-colored pants, and a beaded necklace, gripping the handlebars as her hair flies back.
